zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn於大約1170年出生在蘇格蘭阿吉爾時，她的父親Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles28歲，母親Margaret Stuart of Moidart21歲。她於大約1190年與Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie在蘇格蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn于大约1170年出生在苏格兰阿吉爾时，她的父亲Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles28岁，母亲Margaret Stuart of Moidart21岁。她于大约1190年与Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie在苏格兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: MacDougall
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McDougall
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Dubhghaill, ‘son of Dubhghall’, a personal name composed of the elements dubh ‘black’ + gall ‘stranger’. This was originally a byname used to distinguish the darker-haired Danes from the fair-haired Norwegians. Compare McDowell and Doyle .

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn was born about 1170, in Argyll, Scotland, her father, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, was 28 and her mother, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, was 21. She married Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie about 1190, in Scotland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn est née environ 1170, à Argyll, Écosse, son père, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie environ 1190, à Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn um 1170 in Argyll, Scotland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles 28 und ihre Mutter Margaret Stuart of Moidart 21. Sie hat um 1190 in Scotland Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn è nata il circa 1170 nel Argyll, Scotland, sua padre, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie circa 1190, nel Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lornが約1170年にスコットランドアルグイルで生まれた時，父Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Islesは28歳，母Margaret Stuart of Moidartは21歳であった。約1190年にスコットランドでSir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn(이)가 대략 1170년 스컷랜드 아그이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Stuart of Moidart(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 대략 1190년 스컷랜드에서 Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn nasceu aproximadamente 1170, em Argyll, Scotland, seu pai, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie aproximadamente 1190, em Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn родилась около 1170 г. в местности аргилл, Шотландия, её отцу по имени Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Stuart of Moidart, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie около 1190 г. в местности Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Agnes MacDougall of Lorn nació aproximadamente 1170, en Argyll, Scotland, su papá, Dubgall Mac Somairle King of the Isles, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Margaret Stuart of Moidart, tenía 21 años. Se casó con Sir Norman Leslie Constable of Inverurie, 3rd Baron of Leslie aproximadamente 1190, en Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos.
